overall.description: Game engine footage depicting first-person exploration through a Mediterranean-style coastal village. The character moves from narrow streets between concrete buildings to an open waterfront overlook, then turns onto a tree-lined coastal road ascending toward a large hillside building.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the village street between concrete buildings with shutters

entered.detail: two-story concrete building with dark shutters and flat roof
single-story white building with tiled roof
mature broad-canopy tree providing shade on the left side of the path
two-story pink stucco building with shuttered windows at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective moving along a gravel path through a quiet coastal village. A large concrete building with shutters dominates the right side while a mature olive tree stands on the left. The path leads toward a pink villa visible in the distance under bright midday sun.

events.description: emerging from enclosed village street to open coastal overlook with sea becoming visible
turning left onto coastal road away from the waterfront

agents.ego_description: reaching the village edge to observe the sea, then turning left onto a coastal road

entered.detail: calm sea visible beyond the village with several ships anchored offshore
hazy landmasses visible on the horizon across the water
single-story flat-roofed structure at the water's edge below the viewpoint

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to reveal a panoramic coastal view with the sea and distant islands visible beyond the village rooftops. The camera approaches the edge of an overlook, briefly observes the water, then executes a left turn onto a road that runs parallel to the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined coastal road ascending toward large building

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the ascending coastal road toward the large multi-story building on the hillside

entered.detail: multi-story beige apartment complex with multiple balconies situated on the hillside
line of flat-topped acacia trees providing shade along the left side of the road
white-painted stone wall supporting the elevated terrain on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a paved coastal road ascending gently uphill, flanked by acacia trees on the left and a white stone retaining wall on the right. The large hillside apartment building grows progressively larger as the camera approaches, dominating the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from the enclosed paths of a quiet coastal village to an expansive hillside ascent. It begins by moving along a gravel path between a large concrete building and a mature olive tree, heading toward a distant pink villa under the bright midday sun. As the path opens up, the camera reaches a panoramic overlook that reveals the sea and distant islands beyond the rooftops before turning left onto a road running parallel to the coastline. The scene then shifts to a paved road ascending gently uphill, flanked by acacia trees and a white stone retaining wall. Finally, the camera moves forward as a large hillside apartment building grows progressively larger, eventually dominating the view.
